title: Dreamy Moroccan Lamb Tagine
description: A traditional Moroccan dish made with tender lamb, black pepper, and aromatic spices, cooked to perfection in a donabe vessel, this recipe is onion and garlic free.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the lamb pieces with salt, black pepper, cumin, smoked paprika, and thyme.
Heat a little oil in the donabe over medium heat and brown the lamb pieces on all sides.
Add the chicken broth, diced tomatoes, and browned lamb to the donabe.
Cover the donabe with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 2 1/2 hours or until the lamb is tender and falls apart easily.
Remove the donabe from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
Serve over couscous or with some crusty bread.
